title: PodJob — control-plane→pod job envelope (GET /pod/job)
description: What the pod's long-poll returns: one unit of work, dispatched on type. request is an InferRequest (infer_request.schema.json); spec is a RenderSpec (spec.schema.json). Each carries its own version const (infer_version/spec_version) — this envelope has none, contracts/VERSION stays the single pin for both.

request.description: Present iff type=infer. Opaque here — validated against infer_request.schema.json.

spec.description: Present iff type=render. Opaque here — validated against spec.schema.json.
